title: Goal-scheduler re-dispatches stalled goals forever: >=3 consecutive empty/blocked dossiers must escalate, not repeat (goal 805f6ced: 4 wasted pipelines)
root_cause: No goal-level stall detection exists. When a goal_hash keeps producing empty or blocked dossiers (nothing shipped), the scheduler re-dispatches identical work with no re-scope, split, or flag: goal_hash 805f6ced... burned 4 full pipelines in one batch (cycles 640/642/643/644) landing nothing. Same no-escalation shape as the self-sha recurrence family (cycles 630/632/634, '6th/7th/8th occurrence') and cycle-630 fleet-scope P0 drop - failures repeat under one identity because nothing counts them at the goal layer.
evidence: .evolve/runs/cycle-644/retrospective-report.md (D5 + systemic axis 2); .evolve/instincts/lessons/cycle-644-goalhash-stall-four-empty-dossiers-no-escalation.yaml; dossiers for cycles 640/642/643/644 (empty/blocked, same goal_hash).
fix: Config-driven (policy.json threshold, default 3; no feature flag - policy block like observer/fleet): the scheduler tracks consecutive empty/blocked dossier count per goal_hash (dossier index already carries ship outcome). On threshold: (1) stop blind re-dispatch of the same goal; (2) emit a structured escalation - re-scope hint into the inbox (auto-filed weighted todo naming the stalled goal + the per-cycle abort/block reasons, same seam as retro-preventive-actions-autofile-inbox) and an abnormal-event for the observer; (3) if a narrower reachable slice is named by the latest retro, prefer seeding THAT as the re-scoped item. Counter resets on any non-empty shipped dossier for the goal.
acceptance: Regression test: 3 consecutive empty/blocked dossiers for one goal_hash triggers escalation (no 4th identical dispatch); a shipped dossier in between resets the counter
Escalation files a deduped inbox item naming the goal and block reasons (fixture asserts content keys)
Threshold read from policy.json with compiled default 3 (policy-absent case covered by test)
go test -race on touched packages PASS; apicover clean
source: operator-injection from cycle-644 retrospective preventive actions
